title: ASSISTANT ELECTRICAL ENGINEER
description:
Key Responsibilities

  • Assist in the design, development, and testing of electrical systems and components.
  • Support the preparation of technical drawings, specifications, and engineering documentation.
  • Assist in basic feasibility studies and preliminary cost estimates for electrical systems.
  • Ensure assigned work complies with electrical codes, safety standards, and regulations.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams including mechanical, civil, and software engineers under supervision.
  • Assist in troubleshooting electrical issues and implementing corrective solutions.
  • Support installation, inspection, testing, and commissioning of electrical systems.
  • Assist in maintenance activities and continuous improvement initiatives.
  • Stay informed about emerging technologies and industry best practices.

Job Requirements

Education & Experience

  • Diploma or Bachelor’s degree in Electrical Engineering or a related field (required).
  • Fresh graduates or candidates with up to 2 years of relevant experience are encouraged to apply.
  • Professional Engineer (PE), Engineer-in-Training (EIT), or equivalent certification is an advantage.

Technical Skills

  • Basic knowledge of electrical design software such as AutoCAD, ETAP, MATLAB, or similar tools.
  • Familiarity with electrical codes and standards (e.g., NEC, IEC).
  • Understanding of circuit design, PLCs, power systems, or control systems.
  • Ability to read and interpret electrical drawings and schematics.

Soft Skills

  • Good analytical and problem-solving abilities.
  • Strong communication and teamwork skills.
  • Ability to manage assigned tasks and meet deadlines.
  • Willingness to learn and develop technical expertise.

postedCompany.description:
ABOUT US

SBM Group since its inception in 2007 in Singapore has been one of the pioneers in the field of Marine Offshore Services, Shipbuilding and Repairing, Oil and Gas Engineering enabling significant progress in efficiency of services by providing real-time information and process control solutions.

Our engineering team has a varied domain expertise in the field of steel works, piping, mechanical, electrical, instrumentation & automation and information management. We focus on devising and providing customized solutions for the industries with our extensive knowledge and expertise in this field. We are well- equipped with a consolidated engineering setup thereby offering consistent line of specialised services, systems and products. These range from Technical and Engineering Services; Construction & Commissioning; and project management.

Our core business comprises of wide-range of comprehensive services such as Ship Building and Ship Repairing, Mobile Drilling Units, Repairs, Control System Design and installation onboard the vessel and a diversified land-based automation services. Our service exceeds the industry standards proving our potential in this field. SBM Group personnel’s skills and qualification will take our patrons reach heights in their venture.
postedCompany.name: SBM INDUSTRY & ENGINEERING PTE. LTD.
